code:
import io
import string

fn rot(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    let r = b - 65 + 13
    65 + r % 26
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    let r = b - 97 + 13
    97 + r % 26
  else
    b
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(rot(b))}"
      when None
        i = i
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
